title: True Safety.
content:
'Tis not the walls or purple that defends
    A prince from foes, but 'tis his fort of friends.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Robert Herrick, titled "True Safety.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
